message:
Use shallow clone for changelog labeler

The changed-files action uses the GitHub API for PRs, so full
history is not needed. A shallow clone is sufficient.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -25,8 +25,6 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
-        with:
-          fetch-depth: 0
 
       - name: Get changed files
         id: changed-files
